value.text: CAIN: People: Biographies of People Prominent During 'the Troubles' - O
In January 1970 Ó Brádaigh became President of PSF (1970-83)
This move was taken as a clear indication of his declining influence and two years later he in 1983 he resigned as President of PSF
Gerry Adams has been President of Sinn Fein since 1983

In the course of a lifetime of revolutionary political activity he was elected President of Sinn Féin in 1962. He guided the party through the split of 1969/70 and when the party became Sinn Féin The Workers Party in 1977 he remained as President.
Remembering the Past - Founding of Sinn Féin 1905
On 28 November 1905, 100 years ago, Sinn Féin was founded in the Rotunda, Dublin.

value.text: CAIN: People: Biographies of People Prominent During 'the Troubles' - O
In January 1970 Ó Brádaigh became President of PSF (1970-83)
This move was taken as a clear indication of his declining influence and two years later he in 1983 he resigned as President of PSF
Gerry Adams has been President of Sinn Fein since 1983

In the course of a lifetime of revolutionary political activity he was elected President of Sinn Féin in 1962. He guided the party through the split of 1969/70 and when the party became Sinn Féin The Workers Party in 1977 he remained as President.
Remembering the Past - Founding of Sinn Féin 1905
On 28 November 1905, 100 years ago, Sinn Féin was founded in the Rotunda, Dublin.
